title: Outlook Calendar Changes
description: Schema for the changes-only JSON output produced by Detect-CalendarChanges.ps1. Contains only new, modified, and deleted calendar entries since the previous run.

detectedAt.description: UTC timestamp of when the change detection was performed.

previousRunDate.description: UTC timestamp of the previous successful run. Null on the first run.

isFullRun.description: True if this was a full run (no previous state existed). All entries will be reported as 'new'.

new.description: Number of entries that are new since the last run.

modified.description: Number of entries that have been modified since the last run.

deleted.description: Number of entries that existed in the previous run but are no longer present.

unchanged.description: Number of entries that have not changed since the last run.

changes.description: List of changed entries. Empty if nothing has changed.

entry.description: The full calendar entry object (same schema as entries in calendar-export.json). See schema.json for field definitions.

changeType.description: Indicates this entry was deleted (present in previous run but not in current export).

entryId.description: The Outlook entryId of the deleted item.

lastKnownSubject.description: The subject/title from the last time this entry was seen. Null if not available.

lastKnownStart.description: The start date-time from the last time this entry was seen. Null if not available.
